name: Cochiti Green Chile Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lean chuck, cut into small cubes
12 large green chiles, roasted and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chuck in a little oil in a large deep pan.
2. Add the onions and sauté for 3-5 minutes.
3. Add the potatoes. When ingredients have browned, pour off any oil.
4. Add the zucchini squash, chiles cut up (if using), garlic salt, and salt.
5. Pour in water to cover the ingredients.
6. Bring to a boil and simmer for at least 1/2 hour.
7. Serve stew with a spoon like a hearty soup.
